learningObjectives: Name family members and friends using core Starters vocabulary.
Use verb be (am, is, are) to describe people.
Use possessive adjectives my, your, his, her correctly.
Answer who-questions about people in pictures and short texts.
Introduce yourself and one family member in words and short phrases.
grammarFocus: Possessive adjectives: my, your, his, her

grammarReference.explanation: Use am with I; is with he, she, it and singular nouns; are with you, we, they and plural nouns.
commonMistakes: I is happy (×) → I am happy (✓)
She are my sister (×) → She is my sister (✓)

grammarReference.structure: Possessive adjectives: my, your, his, her
grammarReference.explanation: Possessive adjectives come before a noun to show who something belongs to.
Use who to ask about a person.
commonMistakes: What is he? (when asking identity) → Who is he? (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Face Words
lessons.learningObjective: Name and use head, eyes, nose, mouth and hair in short sentences.

exercises.title: Learn: Face Words
exercises.instructions: Read each clue. Choose the face word.

questions.questionText: You see with your _____.
questions.explanation: Eyes (mắt) dùng để nhìn. Nose để ngửi; mouth để ăn.

questions.questionText: You smell with your _____.
questions.explanation: Nose (mũi) dùng để ngửi.

choices.distractorNote: On the head, not for smelling

questions.questionText: You eat with your _____.
questions.explanation: Mouth (miệng) dùng để ăn và nói.

choices.distractorNote: Whole top part, not for eating

questions.questionText: Long or short _____ grows on your head.
questions.explanation: Hair (tóc) mọc trên đầu. Head là cả phần đầu.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Face Parts
exercises.instructions: Match each word to what you do with it or where it is.

questions.questionText: Match face words to their descriptions.
questions.explanation: Mỗi bộ phận có chức năng hoặc vị trí riêng trên khuôn mặt/đầu.

pairs.right: you eat and talk with it

exercises.title: Check: Face Words Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer. No hints.

questions.questionText: The part above your neck that has your face is your _____.
questions.explanation: Head (đầu) là phần trên cổ có mặt. Hair chỉ là tóc.

questions.questionText: Her _____ are brown. She can see well.
questions.explanation: Eyes (mắt) — are + eyes; dùng để nhìn.

questions.questionText: Touch your _____. It is at the top of your body.
questions.explanation: Head (đầu) ở trên cùng cơ thể.

choices.distractorNote: In the face, not the top

exercises.title: Apply: Face Words in Context
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences with face words.

questions.questionText: Complete: I see with my [0]. | I smell with my [1]. | Her [2] is long.
questions.explanation: eyes (mắt); nose (mũi); hair (tóc) — her hair is long.

content.template: I see with my [0]. I smell with my [1]. Her [2] is long.

exercises.title: Review: Face Words Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer. No hints.

questions.questionText: The part above your neck that has your face is your _____.
questions.explanation: Head (đầu) là phần trên cổ có mặt. Hair chỉ là tóc.

questions.questionText: Her _____ are brown. She can see well.
questions.explanation: Eyes (mắt) — are + eyes; dùng để nhìn.

questions.questionText: Touch your _____. It is at the top of your body.
questions.explanation: Head (đầu) ở trên cùng cơ thể.

choices.distractorNote: In the face, not the top

exercises.title: Review: Face Words Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer. No hints.

questions.questionText: The part above your neck that has your face is your _____.
questions.explanation: Head (đầu) là phần trên cổ có mặt. Hair chỉ là tóc.

questions.questionText: Her _____ are brown. She can see well.
questions.explanation: Eyes (mắt) — are + eyes; dùng để nhìn.

questions.questionText: Touch your _____. It is at the top of your body.
questions.explanation: Head (đầu) ở trên cùng cơ thể.

choices.distractorNote: In the face, not the top

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Friends and People
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and use friend, boy and girl to talk about people at Starters level.

exercises.title: Learn: Friends and People
exercises.instructions: Read each sentence. Choose the best word.

questions.questionText: Tom plays with you at school. Tom is your _____.
questions.explanation: Friend (bạn) là người bạn chơi cùng ở trường. Brother là anh/em trai trong gia đình.

choices.distractorNote: Family member, not a school friend

questions.questionText: A young male child is a _____.
questions.explanation: Boy (cậu bé) chỉ con trai nhỏ. Girl là con gái; friend là quan hệ, không phải giới tính.

questions.questionText: Anna is a young _____. She is seven.
questions.explanation: Girl (cô bé) phù hợp với tên nữ và tuổi nhỏ. Boy dùng cho con trai.

choices.distractorNote: Adult woman; age does not fit

questions.questionText: My best _____ is Linh. We sit together in class.
questions.explanation: Friend (bạn) là người ngồi cạnh ở lớp. Sister là chị/em gái trong gia đình.

choices.distractorNote: Family role; classmate may not be sister

exercises.title: Practice: Match Friends and People
exercises.instructions: Match each word to the correct meaning.

questions.questionText: Match the people words to their meanings.
questions.explanation: Mỗi từ khớp một nghĩa rõ ràng. Boy/girl nói giới tính/tuổi; friend nói quan hệ.

pairs.right: a person you like and know

exercises.title: Check: Friends Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: She is not my sister. She is my _____ from class.
questions.explanation: from class → friend (bạn), không phải thành viên gia đình.

questions.questionText: Look at the picture: a young male child. He is a _____.
questions.explanation: Boy (cậu bé) = young male. Girl là nữ.

questions.questionText: Lily and Mai play together. They are _____.
questions.explanation: Hai người chơi cùng nhau thường là friends (bạn). Sister cần quan hệ gia đình.

exercises.title: Apply: People in Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct word.

questions.questionText: Complete: Tom is my [0]. | He is a [1]. | Anna is a [2].
questions.explanation: friend (bạn); boy (cậu bé) với he; girl (cô bé) với Anna.

content.template: Tom is my [0]. He is a [1]. Anna is a [2].

exercises.title: Review: Friends Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: She is not my sister. She is my _____ from class.
questions.explanation: from class → friend (bạn), không phải thành viên gia đình.

questions.questionText: Look at the picture: a young male child. He is a _____.
questions.explanation: Boy (cậu bé) = young male. Girl là nữ.

questions.questionText: Lily and Mai play together. They are _____.
questions.explanation: Hai người chơi cùng nhau thường là friends (bạn). Sister cần quan hệ gia đình.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: my, your, his, her
lessons.learningObjective: Use possessive adjectives my, your, his and her before family and friend nouns.

exercises.title: Learn: my, your, his, her
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct possessive adjective.

questions.questionText: I talk about myself: This is _____ mother.
questions.explanation: My (của tôi) dùng khi nói về bản thân.

questions.questionText: You ask a friend: Is this _____ brother?
questions.explanation: Your (của bạn) khi hỏi người nghe.

questions.questionText: Nam is a boy. _____ name is Nam.
questions.explanation: His (của anh ấy) với Nam (boy).

questions.questionText: Anna is a girl. _____ eyes are brown.
questions.explanation: Her (của cô ấy) với Anna (girl).

exercises.title: Practice: Possessives Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete with my, your, his or her.

questions.questionText: Complete: This is [0] father. | [1] name is Duc. | [2] hair is black.
questions.explanation: my father; His name (Duc = boy); Her hair (mother = she).

content.template: This is [0] father. [1] name is Duc. [2] hair is black.

exercises.title: Check: Possessives Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Lily is my friend. _____ name is Lily.
questions.explanation: Lily là nữ → Her name.

questions.questionText: Point to yourself: _____ mother is kind.
questions.explanation: Nói về bản thân → My mother.

questions.questionText: Ask your friend: Is _____ sister seven?
questions.explanation: Hỏi bạn → your sister.

exercises.title: Apply: Order Possessive Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: She / is / my / sister.
questions.explanation: She is my sister. — She + is + my + noun.

questions.questionText: Make: His / name / is / Nam.
questions.explanation: His name is Nam. — His + name + is + tên.

exercises.title: Review: Possessives Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Lily is my friend. _____ name is Lily.
questions.explanation: Lily là nữ → Her name.

questions.questionText: Point to yourself: _____ mother is kind.
questions.explanation: Nói về bản thân → My mother.

questions.questionText: Ask your friend: Is _____ sister seven?
questions.explanation: Hỏi bạn → your sister.

exercises.title: Review: Possessives Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Lily is my friend. _____ name is Lily.
questions.explanation: Lily là nữ → Her name.

questions.questionText: Point to yourself: _____ mother is kind.
questions.explanation: Nói về bản thân → My mother.

questions.questionText: Ask your friend: Is _____ sister seven?
questions.explanation: Hỏi bạn → your sister.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: am, is, are Practice
lessons.learningObjective: Choose am, is and are correctly with I, he, she, we and they.

exercises.title: Learn: am, is, are
exercises.instructions: Choose am, is or are to complete each sentence.

questions.questionText: I _____ seven years old.
questions.explanation: Dùng am với I (tôi). Is dùng với he/she/it; are với you/we/they.

questions.questionText: He _____ my brother.
questions.explanation: Dùng is với he (anh ấy/cậu ấy).

questions.questionText: We _____ happy friends.
questions.explanation: Dùng are với we (chúng tôi/chúng ta).

questions.questionText: They _____ my mother and father.
questions.explanation: Dùng are với they (họ) — hai người = they.

exercises.title: Practice: Fill in am, is, are
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences with am, is or are.

questions.questionText: Complete: I [0] Mai. | She [1] my friend. | They [2] boys.
questions.explanation: I am; She is; They are — chia động từ be theo chủ ngữ.

content.template: I [0] Mai. She [1] my friend. They [2] boys.

exercises.title: Check: Be Verb Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form. No hints.

questions.questionText: You _____ my good friend.
questions.explanation: You are — are đi với you.

questions.questionText: Anna and I _____ in Class 2A.
questions.explanation: Anna and I = we → We are.

questions.questionText: It _____ a family photo.
questions.explanation: It is — is đi với it (nó).

exercises.title: Apply: Build Sentences with be
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: I / am / eight.
questions.explanation: I am eight. — I + am + số tuổi.

questions.questionText: Make a sentence: They / are / my / friends.
questions.explanation: They are my friends. — They + are + my + danh từ.

exercises.title: Review: Be Verb Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form. No hints.

questions.questionText: You _____ my good friend.
questions.explanation: You are — are đi với you.

questions.questionText: Anna and I _____ in Class 2A.
questions.explanation: Anna and I = we → We are.

questions.questionText: It _____ a family photo.
questions.explanation: It is — is đi với it (nó).

questions.questionText: Complete: This is [0] father. | [1] name is Duc. | [2] hair is black.
questions.explanation: my father; His name (Duc = boy); Her hair (mother = she).

content.template: This is [0] father. [1] name is Duc. [2] hair is black.

questions.questionText: Make: She / is / my / sister.

questions.questionText: Make: His / name / is / Nam.

exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Point to yourself: _____ mother is kind.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: More Details from the Text
lessons.learningObjective: Find specific details about hair, eyes, age and feelings in Mai's text.

exercises.title: Learn: More Details
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Answer detail questions.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: What colour is Mai's mother's eyes?
questions.explanation: Her eyes are brown — her = mother.

questions.questionText: How old is Nam?
questions.explanation: He is six.

exercises.title: Practice: Hair and Eyes
exercises.instructions: Read again. Answer about descriptions.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: Whose hair is black?
questions.explanation: His hair is black — his = father.

choices.distractorNote: Mother has brown eyes, not black hair stated

questions.questionText: Mai says her mother is _____.
questions.explanation: My mother is kind.

exercises.title: Check: Detail Reading Quiz
exercises.instructions: Read one more time. Harder questions.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Read About Friends
lessons.learningObjective: Read about friends in Mai's family text and answer detail questions.

exercises.title: Learn: Read About Friends
exercises.instructions: Read Mai's text. Answer about Anna and friends.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: What is Anna's role in the text?
questions.explanation: Anna là bạn của Mai: We have a friend. Her name is Anna.

questions.questionText: Anna is a _____ in Mai's class.
questions.explanation: She is a girl in our class.

exercises.title: Practice: Friends in Context
exercises.instructions: Read again. Answer about people and words.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: In 'He is a boy', who is he?
questions.explanation: He là Nam — anh trai của Mai.

questions.questionText: Why is Anna not in Mai's family photo as a sister?
questions.explanation: Text nói friend from class, không phải sister.

choices.text: She is a friend, not a sister.
She is not in the photo.
choices.distractorNote: She is mentioned in the text

exercises.title: Check: Friends Reading Quiz
exercises.instructions: Read carefully. Choose the best answer.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:

passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: Who is the boy in the text?
questions.explanation: Nam là boy, anh trai sáu tuổi của Mai.

questions.questionText: Order: (1) parents (2) brother (3) friend — how does Mai tell the story?
questions.explanation: Mai mô tả bố mẹ trước, rồi anh trai, rồi bạn Anna.

exercises.title: Apply: Match Friends to Facts
exercises.instructions: Use the text. Match each person to a fact.

exercises.title: Review: Friends Reading Quiz
exercises.instructions: Read carefully. Choose the best answer.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: Who is the boy in the text?
questions.explanation: Nam là boy, anh trai sáu tuổi của Mai.

questions.questionText: Order: (1) parents (2) brother (3) friend — how does Mai tell the story?
questions.explanation: Mai mô tả bố mẹ trước, rồi anh trai, rồi bạn Anna.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: More Details from the Text
lessons.learningObjective: Find specific details about hair, eyes, age and feelings in Mai's text.

exercises.title: Learn: More Details
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Answer detail questions.

passage.title: Mai's Family
passage.text:
Hello! My name is Mai. I am eight years old. This is my family photo.

My father is tall. His hair is black. My mother is kind. Her eyes are brown.

I have one brother. His name is Nam. He is a boy. He is six. We have a friend. Her name is Anna. She is a girl in our class.

We are happy!
passage.imagePrompt: A cheerful family photo: parents, two children, and a friend waving.

questions.questionText: What colour is Mai's mother's eyes?
questions.explanation: Her eyes are brown — her = mother.

questions.questionText: How old is Nam?
questions.explanation: He is six.

exercises.title: Practice: Hair and Eyes
exercises.instructions: Read again. Answer about descriptions.

passage.title: Mai's Family

We are happy!

questions.questionText: Whose hair is black?
questions.explanation: His hair is black — his = father.

choices.distractorNote: Mother has brown eyes, not black hair stated

questions.questionText: Mai says her mother is _____.
questions.explanation: My mother is kind.

exercises.title: Check: Detail Reading Quiz
exercises.instructions: Read one more time. Harder questions.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Review At Home
lessons.learningObjective: Review the at-home listening script and identify all people correctly.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen at Home Again
exercises.instructions: Listen to Minh at home. Answer the questions.

script.title: At Home

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: He is my brother. His name is Duc.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No. She is my friend. Her name is Lily.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with short pauses. Total duration approx. 35 seconds.

questions.questionText: Who is the woman?
questions.explanation: This is my mother.

choices.distractorNote: Minh says no to sister for the girl

questions.questionText: What is the brother's name?
questions.explanation: His name is Duc.

exercises.title: Practice: Lily and Duc
exercises.instructions: Listen again. Focus on the friend and brother.

script.title: At Home

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: He is my brother. His name is Duc.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No. She is my friend. Her name is Lily.

script.audioNotes: Clear, slow delivery with short pauses. Total duration approx. 35 seconds.

questions.questionText: Who is Lily?
questions.explanation: She is my friend.

questions.questionText: Minh says 'No' when asked if the girl is his _____.
questions.explanation: Is the girl your sister? — No.

choices.distractorNote: She is friend, but question was about sister

exercises.title: Check: At Home Review Quiz
exercises.instructions: Listen one final time. Choose carefully.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: At School Dialogue
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to a school conversation and identify family members.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen at School
exercises.instructions: Listen to the conversation at school. Answer the first questions.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Hello, Hoa. Who is the girl with you?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: She is my sister. Her name is Lan.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes. He is my brother. He is a boy.

questions.questionText: Who is Lan?
questions.explanation: Hoa nói: She is my sister. Her name is Lan.

questions.questionText: Who is the man?
questions.explanation: He is my father.

exercises.title: Practice: More from At School
exercises.instructions: Listen again. Answer the next questions.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Hello, Hoa. Who is the girl with you?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: She is my sister. Her name is Lan.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes. He is my brother. He is a boy.

questions.questionText: Is the boy Hoa's brother?
questions.explanation: Yes. He is my brother.

questions.questionText: Hoa says the brother is a _____.
questions.explanation: He is a boy.

exercises.title: Check: School Listening Quiz
exercises.instructions: Listen one more time. Choose carefully.

lines.speaker: Teacher
lines.text: Hello, Hoa. Who is the girl with you?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: She is my sister. Her name is Lan.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes. He is my brother. He is a boy.

questions.questionText: What is the sister's name?
questions.explanation: Her name is Lan.

questions.questionText: How many family members does Hoa talk about?
questions.explanation: Sister, father, brother — three people.

exercises.title: Apply: Match School Dialogue
exercises.instructions: Listen again. Match each person to what Hoa says.

lines.text: Hello, Hoa. Who is the girl with you?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: She is my sister. Her name is Lan.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes. He is my brother. He is a boy.

questions.questionText: Match people to Hoa's words.
questions.explanation: Lan = sister; man = father; boy = brother.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Write About a Friend
lessons.learningObjective: Write short gap-fill frames and answers about a friend.

exercises.title: Learn: Friend Writing Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete sentences about a friend.

questions.questionText: Complete: Tom is [0] friend. | [1] is a boy. | [2] name is Tom.
questions.explanation: my friend; He; His name.

content.template: Tom is [0] friend. [1] is a boy. [2] name is Tom.

exercises.title: Practice: Order Friend Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: She / is / my / friend.
questions.explanation: She is my friend.

questions.questionText: Make: Her / name / is / Anna.
questions.explanation: Her name is Anna.

exercises.title: Check: Write About a Friend
exercises.instructions: Write short answers about a friend.

content.taskDescription: Write about your friend using short answers.
prompts: 2. Is your friend a boy or a girl?
successCriteria: Uses friend and boy or girl

vocabulary.criteria: Uses friend, boy, girl from the unit.

organization.criteria: Answers are clear and in order.

taskAchievement.criteria: All parts completed at Starters length.

questions.questionText: Write your answers to the prompts in the task.
questions.explanation: Chấp nhận câu trả lời đáp ứng tiêu chí. Model answer cho thấy phạm vi mong đợi ở Starters.

exercises.title: Apply: Write About a Friend
exercises.instructions: Complete the gap-fill writing frames.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] name is Lily. | She is [1] friend. | We [2] happy.
questions.explanation: Her name; my; are — We are happy.

content.template: [0] name is Lily. She is [1] friend. We [2] happy.

questions.questionText: Complete: He is [0] boy. | [1] is my friend. | [2] hair is short.
questions.explanation: a boy; Tom (name) or He; His hair.

content.template: He is [0] boy. [1] is my friend. [2] hair is short.

exercises.instructions: Write short answers about a friend.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Short Sentences About Family
lessons.learningObjective: Write short sentences and answers about family members.

exercises.title: Learn: Family Sentence Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence about family.

questions.questionText: Complete: This is [0] father. | She is [1] mother. | He is [2] brother.
questions.explanation: my (của tôi) trước các thành viên gia đình.

content.template: This is [0] father. She is [1] mother. He is [2] brother.

exercises.title: Practice: Order Family Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put words in order to make sentences.

questions.questionText: Make: My / father / is / tall.
questions.explanation: My father is tall. — mẫu câu mô tả gia đình.

questions.questionText: Make: She / is / my / sister.
questions.explanation: She is my sister.

exercises.title: Check: Write About Family
exercises.instructions: Write short answers. Use 1–5 words each.

content.taskDescription: Write short answers about your family. Use words from the unit.
prompts: 2. Who is your mother? (Write: my mother)
3. Write one sentence: My _____ is _____. (Use father, brother or sister)
successCriteria: Uses my before a family noun

vocabulary.criteria: Uses family words from the unit.

questions.questionText: Write your answers to the prompts in the task.
questions.explanation: Chấp nhận câu trả lời đáp ứng tiêu chí. Model answer cho thấy phạm vi mong đợi.

exercises.title: Apply: More Family Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the writing frames.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] name is Hoa. | [1] is my sister. | We [2] happy.
questions.explanation: My name; She; are — We are happy.

content.template: [0] name is Hoa. [1] is my sister. We [2] happy.

exercises.instructions: Write short answers. Use 1–5 words each.

vocabulary.criteria: Uses family words from the unit.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: More Situational Replies
lessons.learningObjective: Choose and say appropriate short replies in family and friend situations.

exercises.title: Learn: Situational Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply in each situation.

questions.questionText: Friend asks: Who is she? (your sister) You say:
questions.explanation: She is my sister.

questions.questionText: Teacher asks: How old are you? You say:
questions.explanation: I am + tuổi.

exercises.title: Practice: More Situations
exercises.instructions: Choose what you would say.

questions.questionText: Examiner: Is he your father? (Yes) You say:
questions.explanation: Yes. He is my father.

questions.questionText: Friend asks about Anna. You say:
questions.explanation: Her name is Anna. — giới thiệu bạn gái.

questions.questionText: You finish talking about family happily. You say:
questions.explanation: We are happy! — kết thúc tích cực.

exercises.title: Check: Situational Speaking
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions in short phrases.

content.prompt: The examiner asks everyday questions about you, your family and friends.
content.pictureDescription: A mother, father, boy, girl and friend in a garden.
followUpQuestions: What is your name?
Who is he in the picture?
Who is your best friend?
How old is your brother or sister?
Say one sentence about your family.

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Key words are clear enough to understand.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Uses am/is/are and my/his/her in answers.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Uses family and friend words from the unit.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo bốn tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick Situational Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Someone says: Nice to meet your family! You say:
questions.explanation: We are happy! — phản hồi tích cực phù hợp unit.

questions.questionText: Examiner points to your sister. You say:
questions.explanation: She is my sister.

exercises.title: Review: Situational Speaking
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions in short phrases.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Picture — Who Is Who?
lessons.learningObjective: Identify and name family and friends in a picture using short phrases.

exercises.title: Learn: Who Is in the Picture?
exercises.instructions: Imagine a family picture. Choose the best answer.

content.pictureDescription: A mother, father, boy, girl and friend in a garden.

questions.questionText: The tall man is the _____.
questions.explanation: Trong ảnh gia đình, người đàn ông lớn thường là father.

questions.questionText: The young girl in the family is the _____.
questions.explanation: Young girl in family → sister.

exercises.title: Practice: Point and Name
exercises.instructions: Choose what you would say for each person.

content.pictureDescription: A mother, father, boy, girl and friend in a garden.

questions.questionText: Point to your mother. You say:
questions.explanation: She is my mother.

questions.questionText: Point to a boy who is your brother. You say:
questions.explanation: He is my brother.

choices.distractorNote: Wrong relationship if he is brother

exercises.title: Check: Picture Interview
exercises.instructions: Answer about people in a family picture.

content.prompt: Look at a family picture. The examiner asks about the people.
content.pictureDescription: A mother, father, boy, girl and friend in a garden.
followUpQuestions: Who is the woman?
Who is the boy?
Is the girl your sister or your friend?
What do you say about your father?

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Family words (mother, father, brother, sister, friend) are understandable.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Uses at least three unit words.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Picture Who Is Who
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Teacher points to a girl from class. You say:
questions.explanation: She is my friend — from class, not sister.

questions.questionText: You point to yourself and your age. You say:
questions.explanation: I am seven. — giới thiệu tuổi bản thân.

exercises.title: Review: Picture Interview
exercises.instructions: Answer about people in a family picture.

content.prompt: Look at a family picture. The examiner asks about the people.
content.pictureDescription: A mother, father, boy, girl and friend in a garden.
followUpQuestions: Who is the woman?
Who is the boy?
Is the girl your sister or your friend?
What do you say about your father?

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Family words (mother, father, brother, sister, friend) are understandable.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Uses at least three unit words.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: More Situational Replies
lessons.learningObjective: Choose and say appropriate short replies in family and friend situations.

exercises.title: Learn: Situational Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply in each situation.

questions.questionText: Friend asks: Who is she? (your sister) You say:
questions.explanation: She is my sister.

questions.questionText: Teacher asks: How old are you? You say:
questions.explanation: I am + tuổi.

exercises.title: Practice: More Situations
exercises.instructions: Choose what you would say.

questions.questionText: Examiner: Is he your father? (Yes) You say:
questions.explanation: Yes. He is my father.

questions.questionText: Friend asks about Anna. You say:
questions.explanation: Her name is Anna. — giới thiệu bạn gái.

questions.questionText: You finish talking about family happily. You say:
questions.explanation: We are happy! — kết thúc tích cực.

exercises.title: Check: Situational Speaking
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions in short phrases.

content.prompt: The examiner asks everyday questions about you, your family and friends.
content.pictureDescription: A mother, father, boy, girl and friend in a garden.
followUpQuestions: What is your name?
Who is he in the picture?
Who is your best friend?
How old is your brother or sister?
Say one sentence about your family.

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Key words are clear enough to understand.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Uses am/is/are and my/his/her in answers.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Uses family and friend words from the unit.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick Situational Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Someone says: Nice to meet your family! You say:
questions.explanation: We are happy! — phản hồi tích cực phù hợp unit.

questions.questionText: Examiner points to your sister. You say:
questions.explanation: She is my sister.

exercises.title: Review: Situational Speaking
